title: Centralized SessionState with listener-based updates
description:
Claude Code has state/ — a thread-safe SessionState singleton (Arc<RwLock<>>) with ~98 fields grouped by Identity/Telemetry/Permissions/Auth/UI/etc., exposing ~210 getters/setters + broadcast channels for on_session_switch etc. OC has state scattered across App, ChatSession, config loaders with no central signal model.

## Symptoms
- Fields like 'has_exited_plan_mode', 'needs_plan_mode_exit_attachment' are threaded through function args
- No event bus for state transitions (session switch, mode change, auth refresh)
- Permission manager, hook engine, memory_db each hold their own Arc

## Scope
- src/state/ module with SessionState struct
- Categorized field groups (Identity, Permissions, Telemetry, UI State, Teleport, ScheduledTasks)
- tokio::sync::broadcast for session-switch subscribers
- Migration: gradually move fields off App into SessionState

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/state/
- /home/doll/claude-code-design-documents/.design/state-management.md (REQ-1 enumerates all 98 fields)
